title: Blink Charging Q3 2025 Financial Results Announcement
text: Blink Charging Q3 2025 Financial Results Summary. Key Financial Metrics. Revenue Performance: Total Q3 revenues: $27.0M up 7.3% YoY, Service revenues: $11.9M up 35.5% YoY, Product revenues: $13.0M down 3.1% YoY, Nine-month 2025 total revenues: $76.5M versus $96.0M in 2024. Profitability: Gross margin improved to 35.8% in Q3, Net loss: $0.09M ($0.00 per share) versus $87.4M loss in Q3 2024, Nine-month net loss: $52.8M versus $124.6M in 2024. Cash Position: Cash and equivalents: $23.1M down from $41.8M at year-end 2024, Zero cash debt, Operating cash burn reduced 87% sequentially to $2.2M. Operational Highlights: CEO stated the company is regaining momentum after a modest year start, with transformation efforts delivering the intended impact. Cost Reduction Initiatives: Operating expenses decreased 26% YoY excluding non-recurring items, Eliminated approximately $13M in annualized operating expenses, Transitioned to contract manufacturing while maintaining internal hardware and firmware control. Growth Drivers: Charger utilization increased, Service revenue growth accelerated substantially, Crypto payment integration planned for year-end launch, Shasta L2 Charger development progressing.
